meta.scenario: deep house +1 move, 10.7 BPM gap — large stretch, groove exit

transition_arc: Significant BPM jump (10.7 BPM, ~9.5%) — both tracks time-stretched to ref BPM. T1 exits from groove, T2 enters from its first downbeat (clean percussion intro). The large BPM gap is hidden by the 16-bar fade: listener ear re-anchors to T2's pulse gradually. Bass swap is critical here — two stretched basslines at different native BPMs would clash.

annotated_actions.t1_state: T1 bar 64: drums=0.6, harmonic=0.4, rms=0.45 — mid-groove, steady energy
annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 0: clean intro, percussion only, drums=0.3, bass=0.0, rms=0.15
annotated_actions.why: T1 at bar 64 is past its peak (bars 32-48). Energy is steady but not building — safe exit. T2 bar 0 is a genuine percussion intro, allowing gradual introduction.

annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 0: light kick + hi-hats, bass=0.0, harmonic=0.1 (pads filtering in)
annotated_actions.why: T2 from_bar=0: genuine percussion-only intro. drums:0.8 adds T2's light kick texture. bass:0.0 prevents clash with T1's bass. other:0.6 brings in T2's organ early — 4A and 3A are compatible.

annotated_actions.t1_state: T1 bar 72: bass=0.2 (fading), drums=0.3, rms=0.25 — clearly diminishing
annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 8: bass starting to appear at 0.3, kick established
annotated_actions.why: T2 bass is just entering. Swap here transfers the low end cleanly before T2 bass fully locks in at bar 16.

annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 16: full groove — kick, bass, organ all active, RMS 0.50
annotated_actions.why: T2 full groove starts. from_bar=16 is T2's first full-groove bar after its intro.
